Projects

Project

GamesHub

A comprehensive digital gaming marketplace offering game accounts, boosting, and in-game currencies. Engineered with a robust NestJS backend and high-performance caching.

NestJSTypeScriptPrismaPostgreSQLRedisDocker
https://gameshubeg.vercel.app
Explore Portal
Project

IdentityFlow Validator

High-performance C# automation engine designed to analyze authentication recovery workflows across external identity providers with heuristic state-detection.

C#.NETHtmlAgilityPackAutomationResilient Networking
https://github.com/RamyKhairy24/IdentityFlow-Validator
Explore Portal
Project

Excel Automation Engine

Multithreaded C# engine capable of processing 2 million user records in ~50 seconds using parallel concurrency and thread-safe data structures.

C#MultithreadingEPPlusClosedXMLPerformance
https://github.com/RamyKhairy24/Multithreading-excel-sheet-program
Explore Portal
Project

Octopus System

Customer service quality-assurance platform for agencies. Users screenshot emails or any document — Octopus OCR-scans the content, exports it as Excel, persists records to a SQL database, and provides a unified data hub with live preview and bulk export.

C#.NETOCRExcel ExportSQL ServerWinForms
#
Explore Portal

June 2025 – July 2025

Software Developer Intern

Commercial International Bank (CIB Egypt)
